h1. Data Compass Search Service

h2. Purpose

Provide controlled APIs for exact search, semantic search, graph search, and hybrid search.

h2. Search Types

|| Search Type || Purpose ||
| Exact Search | Lookup by GUID, JRN, name, schema, report ID |
| Semantic Search | Natural-language metadata discovery |
| Graph Search | Upstream/downstream and relationship traversal |
| Hybrid Search | Combine exact, semantic, and graph search |

h2. Primary APIs

* Exact Metadata Search API
* Semantic Search API
* Graph Search API
* Hybrid Search API
* Source Record Hydration API
* Source Citation API

h2. Requirements

|| ID || Requirement || Priority ||
| SRCH-001 | Search by GUID/JRN | P0 |
| SRCH-002 | Search by name/schema/store | P0 |
| SRCH-003 | Search by owner/node | P0 |
| SRCH-004 | Semantic vector search | P0 |
| SRCH-005 | Graph traversal search | P1 |
| SRCH-006 | Hybrid search | P1 |
| SRCH-007 | Source record hydration | P1 |
| SRCH-008 | Result citation output | P1 |

h2. Success Criteria

* Users can find assets by exact identifier.
* Users can search using business language.
* Results include source GUID/JRN.
* Results are deduplicated by source JRN.
* Access-control filters are applied before results are returned.

h2. Pitfalls / Risks

|| Risk || Impact || Mitigation ||
| Exact and semantic results conflict | User confusion | Hydrate source records and dedupe by JRN |
| Results lack source references | Low trust | Require citation output |
| Unauthorized result is returned | Critical security issue | Apply access filters before return/context assembly |
| Search ranking is weak | Poor user adoption | Add ranking by relevance, lifecycle, ownership, certification, graph proximity |
